name: Crunchy Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Place the pie filling in a 9-inch unbaked pie shell.
3. In a small bowl, beat the egg yolk with sugar, flour, vanilla, lemon juice, and pecans until well combined.
4. In another small bowl, beat the egg white until foamy.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the apple mixture.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
7. Bake for 30-45 minutes or until apples are tender and golden brown.
Source: newsletter, Nov '89, Dolores McCann
